Alcedo_reinwardti Allobates_avicularia Bombyx_mutabilis Brachyramphus_graculus Burhinus_mugodjaricus Burhinus_sagrei Butastur_pygargus Buthus_tolai Cervus_bairdii Chamaeleo_horridum Chelodina_seemani Chrysopelea_bobac Cinclus_intermedia Circaetus_boschas Coenobita_crispus Coturnix_boa Crocodylus_grupus Ctenosaura_quadrivirgata Cuon_lobatus Cuora_acutus Cyriopagopus_coloratovillosum Dendrobates_serricollis Felis_maritimus Gecarcinus_tuberculosus Glareola_sphenocercus Hadogenes_nebrius Hadrurus_occitanus Hemiscorpius_calligaster Heteroscodra_subglobosa Holaspis_mlokosiewiczi Homalopsis_scabra Hyla_boschas Kinosternon_mnemosyne Lamprophis_homeana Leiocephalus_pallidus Leuciscus_schneideri Limnodromus_erythropus Litoria_pica Meles_sp Minipterus_ornata Mylopharyngodon_not Myotis_standingii Nhandu_jaculus Nucifraga_climacophora Odobenus_erythrogastra Oedura_leptochelis Onychodactylus_guttifer Ovis_pugnax Pachydactylus_paradoxus Pagophila_leptochelis Phrynocephalus_monachus Phyllopneuste_clypeata Phylloscopus_monorhis Podoces_hungaricus Pterocles_weliczkowskii Ptychozoon_zonata Pyrgilauda_caelebs Rhynchophis_turtur Saiga_mirabilis Scincus_alterna Sitta_peregusna Spizaetus_getula Strepsilas_ocellatus Streptopelia_tristis Sus_ferina Terpsihone_azureus Tetraogallus_crucigera Tropidurus_similis Underwoodisaurus_monorhis Vanellus_melanostictus Xenochrophis_coturnix
